title: Off The Shelf
description: A mod about shelving with many block variants
body:
# Off The Shelf

[![Made for ModFest 26](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/v2/badge/svg/26/compact.svg)](https://modfest.net/26)

## Three New Shelving Blocks
* The Bookcase: A modular shelving block to hold your books. This was largely inspired by the BiblioCraft interpretation of how a book shelf should work.
* The Tiered Shelf: Another modular shelf that will hold any item.
* The Wall Shelf: The simple shelf. Stick it to the sides of blocks, aligned with the center or bottom.

## There's More
A wall of books all the same color would get a little boring. For this reason the book, book and quill, and written book items are now dyeable!
